evidence.excerpt: We shopped at Monastier Ecomarket... Beyond Givry we reached St. Jean le Vaux.
[Hand-drawn map of France]... FRANCE 1997 (page no. 48)

boundaries.notes: Trip already open from previous window (book3 France 1997 trip). Window opens mid-trip at St. Jean le Vaux / Givry; page 48 is a decorative FRANCE 1997 route map within the same trip. Returns home on A_0219_L.

evidence.excerpt: We picked up Tonic + arrived home at 4.30.
August 22nd Friday. 5.25. William, John, Charles, Simon + Eve left home. (Thomas at Greenbelt.) We didn't arrive at Beauchamp until 7.0.

boundaries.mixed_detail: A_0219_R: top of page finishes France 1997 (check tyre pressure / arrived home at 4.30) then the Aug 22nd Beauchamp/Greenbelt weekend begins at 'August 22nd Friday.'; the same page later also begins the next trip (see next boundary).
boundaries.notes: Short Beauchamp weekend (Peter's Haydn quartet, Gus King visit), returns 'home after a cup of tea' on Sat 23rd.

evidence.excerpt: Saturday September 6th. 11.10. We motored to Malmesbury listening to Princess Diana's funeral on the radio.

boundaries.mixed_detail: A_0219_R: the Malmesbury trip starts at 'Saturday September 6th.' on the same page that ends the France trip and starts the Beauchamp weekend (third dated section on this page).
boundaries.notes: Index book3 p.50 'Malmesbury'. Continues on A_0220 (Burton Hill, Sun Sept 7th).

evidence.excerpt: We left, after a very good weekend, at 3.30.
Fri 20 Sept. Simon, Eve John & Charles left home with Tonic to camp at a pub The Anchor at East[?Ington] Welland

boundaries.mixed_detail: A_0221_L: opening lines close the Malmesbury weekend ('We left, after a very good weekend, at 3.30.') then the Welland trip begins at 'Fri 20 Sept.'
boundaries.notes: Index book3 p.50 'East of Welland'. Boys' walk, Castlemorton Common, walk to top of Malverns / hang-gliders. Returns home 6pm on A_0221_R.

boundaries.title_guess: London: Greenwich, Imperial War Museum, Tate (Picketts Lock)

evidence.excerpt: we drove William & Thomas back to school & set off home, arriving at 6 pm
Sat October 25th. All 7 of us set off for London at 10.45... Lee Valley Leisure Centre Picketts Lock.

boundaries.mixed_detail: A_0221_R: top closes the Welland trip ('set off home, arriving at 6 pm') then the London half-term trip begins at 'Sat October 25th.'
boundaries.notes: Index book3 p.51 'London Greenwich / Imp War Museum / Tate'. Half-term at Picketts Lock; Greenwich Oct 26, IWM/Tate Oct 27, Madame Tussauds/Mousetrap Oct 28. Spans A_0221_R-A_0225_L.

evidence.excerpt: We trained + bussed back to the van at Picketts Lock, + drove home, (arriving about 10?)
1998 / April 4th. Noon we left home for Northamptonshi[re]... We turned off the A14 + had lunch at the village hall at Naseby.

boundaries.mixed_detail: A_0225_R: top finishes the London trip ('drove home, arriving about 10?') then a new year/section opens '1998 / April 4th. ... we left home for Northamptonshire.'
boundaries.notes: Index book4 p.55 'Oundle'. Year marker '1998' on this page. Naseby, Waddanhoe/Nene Valley, Oundle Palm Sunday. Heads home on A_0226_R.

evidence.excerpt: We have set off through rainstorms for home. Matt is leaving at New St. Sta. for Bristd.
April 7th. Peter, John, Charles, Eve left for Beauchamp at 8.30. am. John is on a music course.

boundaries.mixed_detail: A_0226_R: middle of the page ends the Oundle trip (heading home, dropping Matt Moon at New Street) then 'April 7th.' begins the Beauchamp/Gloucester trip.
boundaries.notes: Index book4 p.56 'Beauchamp, Gloucester'. Taynton, Gloucester Waterways Museum, John's end-of-course concert. Spans A_0226_R-A_0228_L. (Possible this is one continuous Easter outing with the Oundle trip; reported separately because of explicit 'set off for home' + new departure, confidence reflects mild doubt.)

boundaries.title_guess: Abbey Dore / Golden Valley & Hanley Swan (Malvern)

evidence.excerpt: we wanted to return quickly. But it rained heavily all the way... only reached home after 2 hours.
April 24th Friday. S,E,J,C,5·30. we left to camp west of Hereford... staying at Abbey Dore, at the end of Golden Valley.

boundaries.mixed_detail: A_0228_R: top closes the Beauchamp/Gloucester trip ('only reached home after 2 hours') then 'April 24th Friday.' begins the Abbey Dore trip.
boundaries.notes: Index book4 p.58 'Abbey Dore, Golden Valley' and p.59 'Hanley Swan'. Abbey Dore (Apr 24-26) flows into Blackmore campsite at Hanley Swan / St Edmunds concert; treated as one outing. Spans A_0228_R-top of A_0230_R.

evidence.excerpt: Friday May 22nd. We set off to Malvern to hear Thomas & Peter playing in the orchestra for the summer concert. We parked outside No 7.
by 3.45. we reache[d] Dunar. We had a campfire + there were midges.
Tuesday May 26th... Festiniog Railway at Penrhyn... Wednesday 27th May... reached Machynlleth before lunch.

boundaries.mixed_detail: A_0230_R: top finishes the Abbey Dore/Hanley Swan outing (ostrich farm lunch, bluebell wood at Midsummer Hill) then 'Friday May 22nd' begins the Malvern/Wales trip.
boundaries.notes: Index book4 p.61 'Ainas, Festiniog' and p.62 'Machynlleth'. Malvern concert -> Dunar -> Festiniog Railway -> Machynlleth -> home via Woodpecker Hall (A_0232_R). One continuous late-May half-term outing.

evidence.excerpt: we had a delicious filthy veggie lunch, then came home via Woodpecker Hall, Monmouth.
July 27th Monday S.E.W.A.J.C. ... We left home after Tom's visit at 9.40 & headed north... North Shields, New Castle... in time for the queue to get on the Ferry to Bergen.

boundaries.mixed_detail: A_0232_R: top closes the Wales trip ('came home via Woodpecker Hall, Monmouth') then 'July 27th Monday' begins the Norway ferry trip ('left home... headed north... Ferry to Bergen').
boundaries.notes: Index book4 p.62 'Newcastle, Bergen' onward. Bergen, Voss, Laerdal, Borgund/Urnes stave churches, Nigardsbreen glacier, Forde hospital, Ringebu, Koppang, Sweden (Holjes/Sunne), Oslo museums, Kongsberg. Runs to window end (A_0246) and continues into the next window (index shows Rjukan, Setesdal, Stavanger, home p.80 Beauchamp).

open_at_end: Norway/Sweden 1998 trip starting A_0232_R is still in progress at A_0246 (Kongsberg) and continues past this window
notes: Window is mixed-heavy: trips are short and packed, with most transitions falling mid-page on right-hand pages (A_0219_R, A_0221_R, A_0226_R, A_0228_R, A_0230_R, A_0232_R). A_0235_R is a printed newspaper clipping with no diary text (belongs to surrounding Norway trip). The 'FRANCE 1997' map on A_0218_R is decorative within the continuing France trip, not a new trip. Index page numbers reference volA_book3 (1995-1998) and volA_book4 (1998-2003).
